title: perilla frutescens f. crispa
intro: Perilla frutescens f. crispa, also known as Korean chili or Korean mint, is a variety of the perilla plant, native to Asia and used in traditional medicine and cooking. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation, as well as its antioxidant and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of perilla frutescens f. crispa include reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms. Herbal preparations of perilla frutescens f. crispa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds and provide a range of health benefits.
